text:
おお、見事なもんじゃな。
格段に腕を上げたようじゃのう。

うむ、いいぞいいぞ。
お主の努力に敬意を表して
贈り物をやろう。

今後も、努力を怠らずに
その腕を磨いていって欲しいんじゃ。
応援しておる

Oho... magnificently done.
There's certainly a marked difference.

Hm, yes. Very good.
I'll give you a gift to express my utmost
respect for all your hard work.

I hope you'll continue to hone your skills while
resisting the urge to slack off.
I will be here, urging you on.
